description: A mentor has been assigned to more companies than they can handle, reducing engagement quality.
A sponsor has not confirmed their commitment within the expected timeframe, putting funded companies at risk.
Two programmes have been scheduled at the same venue on overlapping dates.
A mentor has been matched to a startup outside their stated sector expertise.
A company in the programme has incomplete or unverified credentials, blocking their participation.
